actions-list.actionItem: The Speaker announced that the House do now adjourn pursuant to clause 13 of Rule I. The next meeting is scheduled for 9:30 a.m. on March 12, 2026.
The Chair led the House in reciting the Pledge of Allegiance to the Flag.
Pursuant to clause 13 of Rule I, the Journal of the last day's proceedings was approved.
Today's prayer was offered by Rev. Chris Kellerman, S.J., Jesuit Conference of Canada and the United States, Washington D.C.
The Speaker designated the Honorable Robert P. Bresnahan Jr. to act as Speaker pro tempore for today.
The House convened, starting a new legislative day.
